blended.narrative: Granite Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 695 ft. Looking ahead, 29 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 25°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
